overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy coastal fishing village. The character moves from a wooden dock along the shoreline, through a settlement with thatched-roof huts, and into a dense pine forest. The atmosphere is misty with light snow falling, creating a cold, muted color palette.

events.description: character slows slightly while navigating around seated fishermen on the dock edge

fisherman with white hair sitting near fishing nets

large woven fishing nets draped over wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty wooden fishing dock extending over calm water. Geralt walks along the planks, passing seated fishermen on either side. A sailing ship with a tan sail is anchored offshore against a backdrop of rocky cliffs, while light snow falls through the foggy morning air.

events.description: moves from open dock into village area with wooden huts and supply piles
navigates around wooden barrels and supply crates scattered on the dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the village settlement, passing NPCs gathered near supplies and huts

villager standing near thatched hut entrance

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof
stacked wooden barrels for supply storage
wooden crates and boxes piled near the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small coastal village with traditional thatched-roof huts. Wooden barrels and supply crates line the dock as Geralt navigates through the settlement. Villagers are gathered near their homes, some sitting on supplies, while the fog continues to obscure the distant shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail through dense pine woodland

events.description: leaves village and enters forested area with dirt path and dense trees
path becomes darker as tree canopy thickens overhead, reducing light

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow dirt trail through dense forest, moving away from the coast into the woods

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing on rocky outcrop near the water's edge

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
tall evergreen pine trees forming dense forest wall
tall evergreen pine trees forming dense forest wall
large boulders and rocky outcrops among the trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the character follows a narrow dirt trail into a dense pine forest. The wooden dock gives way to an earthen path surrounded by tall evergreen trees and rocky outcrops. The environment becomes darker as the tree canopy thickens, with snow continuing to fall gently through the branches as the character walks deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty coastal dock through a fishing village and into the depths of a dark pine forest. It begins on a wooden pier extending over calm water, where Geralt passes seated fishermen and a sailing ship anchored against rocky cliffs under a light snowfall. As the camera moves forward, the wooden planks transition into a small settlement of thatched-roof huts and scattered supply crates where villagers gather in the fog. The scene then shifts from the open shoreline to a narrow dirt trail, leaving the village behind as the terrain turns to earth and stone. Finally, the environment grows darker and more enclosed as the path leads deep into a dense woodland of tall evergreen trees and thick canopies.
